summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 15 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Still holding at 46 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. Well below the 7-day average of 61 — the team is making real progress. 27 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — cleared all overdue.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 26 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,893 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

149 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **73 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 21 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$41,090 in payments going out this week** across 20 tasks — make sure funds are available. $2,274 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Kyle Aubry - Project 01 and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 18. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 15 overdue (oldest: 26d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 8 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
